introSection: Dino Dash is a steel family roller coaster located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In August 2021, track pieces arrived at the park.

Dino Dash opened on 9 April 2022.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Dino Dash on the park's website

fullText:
Dino Dash is a steel family roller coaster located at Emerald Park in Ashbourne, County Meath, Ireland.

In August 2021, track pieces arrived at the park.

Dino Dash opened on 9 April 2022.






 * Dino Dash on the park's website
